Video.summary: Scary pranks, Halloween hijinks, and a bride’s buggy wedding blunder.
Video.title: Episode 1404

Video.summary: Bees vs. man, slow-mo fails, wild sports, a diva dog, and risky stunts in Nincompoop Corner.
Video.title: Episode 1405

Video.summary: Dracula makes a man scream; a singer falls off a - dock; and a wedding - decoration drops on Granny.
Video.title: Episode 514

Video.summary: A limbo dancer's hair catches on fire; a toucan - attacks a man's feet; a marching band member loses - her pants.
Video.title: Episode 515

Video.summary: A weightlifter takes a broom to the face; previous winners - return to compete for the $100,000 grand prize.
Video.title: Episode 516

Video.summary: A goose races a jet ski; Santa takes a dive; an overinflated - tire pops; a dog knocks over a Christmas - tree.
Video.title: Episode 517

Video.summary: Videos include a man doing a headstand on a bench that tips; and a man belly flopping from the high dive.
Video.title: Episode 518
